title: Moderation Update — 2026-04-29
body:
Community moderation summary for today:

BANNED (2):
• spam_wave_42 — Posted phishing links across 6 channels in 20 minutes. Immediate ban to protect members.
• toxic_runner — Repeated targeted harassment against newcomers. Zero tolerance for hostile behavior.

WARNED (2):
• trusted_helper — Flagged during a moderation disagreement. No action beyond monitoring at this time.
• bot_like_user_77 — Suspicious automation detected (near-identical replies in help channels). Asked to clarify intent.

CLOSED — NO ACTION (1):
• core_maintainer — Mass report determined to be a false positive from brigading after a moderation decision. No wrongdoing found.

LOW SEVERITY (1):
• new_member_17 (report_004) — Formatting issue; handled with guidance.

All 6 reports have been reviewed and resolved. If you see anything concerning, please use the report tool — every report is taken seriously.
